project_context.description: A premium dark-neon piano app featuring MIDI/audio extraction, rolling synthesia-style glowing notes, and an interactive 88-key keyboard.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.

app_structure.hero_section: Top area with overlapping glass panels for song selection, upload, and demo library.
app_structure.rolling_notes_area: Flex-grow area taking up maximum vertical space above the piano. Must have overflow-hidden. Use a subtle linear gradient background (from black to very dark blue/purple at the bottom) to give depth to falling notes.
app_structure.piano_keyboard: Fixed or sticky at the bottom. Full width. Container must allow horizontal scrolling if 88 keys don't fit, or use responsive sizing.

surface_styles.buttons: bg-transparent border border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] hover:bg-[#00F0FF] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300

piano_keyboard.white_keys: Relative positioning, border-r border-black/20, rounded-b-md shadow-sm. Active state: bg-[#00F0FF] drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.8)]
piano_keyboard.black_keys: Absolute positioning, z-10, rounded-b-sm bg-[#121212] border border-white/5. Active state: bg-[#FF003C] drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,60,0.8)]
piano_keyboard.note_labels: Positioned at the bottom of keys, text-[10px] font-mono text-black/50 (white keys) or text-white/50 (black keys).

rolling_notes.style: Rounded rectangles falling from top. Width matches corresponding piano key. Glow effect mandatory.
rolling_notes.animation: Use Framer Motion or HTML5 Canvas for smooth vertical translation of notes.

controls_and_transport.container: Floating glassmorphism bar placed over the lower section of the rolling notes, containing play/pause, stop, speed slider.
controls_and_transport.slider: Shadcn Slider customized with neon accent colors.

settings_panel.style: Shadcn Sheet or Dialog with Neumorphic/Glassmorphism hybrid. Switches and toggles for volume, range, note colors.

upload_zone.style: Dashed border with glowing hover state. Display supported formats (.mid, .mp3, .wav).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must have explicit text color changes on hover. e.g., hover:bg-[#00F0FF] hover:text-black hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)]
motion_and_interactions.key_press: Scale down slightly (scale-95 or scale-y-95) for tactile feedback.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade in with stagger for controls and keyboard.

background_abstract.description: Neon cyberpunk abstract dark background to be used as a low-opacity background layer for the app.
background_abstract.usage: Set as fixed background image with high opacity black overlay (e.g., bg-black/80) to preserve text contrast.

hero_accent.usage: Use in the empty state of the rolling notes area or as a banner image in the demo song library.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements: buttons, inputs, piano keys, settings toggles (e.g., data-testid='play-button', data-testid='piano-key-C4').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over neon backgrounds is black or dark for APCA readability.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use Shadcn card components for the main layout; rely on custom HTML/Tailwind for the glassmorphism layout to maintain creative freedom.
Use Shadcn for interactive logic components (Slider for playback speed, Dialog for settings, Switch for toggles, Tabs for settings navigation).
Ensure the rolling notes visualization area is carefully synced with the piano keyboard width and position. Use percentage-based widths or flex basis corresponding to the 88 keys.
Avoid using purely transparent backgrounds for headers or overlays that contain text. Always use backdrop-blur and a semi-solid dark color.
Implement the 'Electric & Neon' archetype precisely as specified in the color_system. Avoid generic gray/blue tech vibes.
Implement audio/MIDI parsing using a library like @tonejs/midi or similar, and render the visualization using Canvas or Framer Motion for performance.
